name: International Conference on Automation, Robotics and Applications
note: In recent years, the field of automation and robotics has experienced significant advancements, revolutionizing industries and shaping the future of technology. Automation involves the use of technology to perform tasks with minimal human intervention, while Robotics focuses on the design and development of intelligent machines capable of interacting with the physical world. The rapid development of automation and robotics has been fueled by advancements in key technologies such as sensors, actuators, control systems, machine learning, computer vision, and human-robot interaction. These technologies have enabled the creation of autonomous systems that can perceive their environment, make decisions, and execute tasks efficiently.

name: International Symposium on Heterogeneous and Multi-Domain Systems
note: An international scientific symposium on modeling, integration, coordination, and operation of systems spanning multiple engineering and computational domains.

name: IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation
IEEE/ASME International Conference on Advanced Intelligent Mechatronics
International Conference on Cable-Driven Parallel Robots
ACM/IEEE International Conference on Human-Robot Interaction
IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems
IEEE-RAS International Conference on Soft Robotics
note: The theme for the 10th IEEE International Conference on Soft Robotics (Robosoft27) centres on “Soft Robotics in the Wild”, emphasizing both the source of endless bioinspiration that drives our field, and the ongoing maturation of soft robotics technology into deployment in tough natural environments.
